title: Pan-Seared Brazilian Confit with Lotus Root and Renkon
description: A flavorful and savory dish featuring the rich flavors of Brazilian confit, pan-seared with lotus root and served with renkon.

ingredients.name: Lotus Root
ingredients.notes: Peel and slice into 1/2-inch thick rounds

ingredients.name: Pillowy
ingredients.notes: Optional: Use as a garnish or add to pan for extra flavor

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add Brazilian confit and stir to coat with oil and garlic.
Add sliced lotus root and renkon to the skillet, stirring to combine with confit.
Cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until lotus root and renkon are tender and lightly browned.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with pillowy if desired.
Optional: Add pillowy to the pan and stir to combine for an extra layer of flavor.
